xiaoxinshu-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 21 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new JDK version.
xiaoxinshu-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this property, the project may compile with default settings (often matching the source version or an older target), resulting in bytecode that does not leverage Java 21 features or fails strict compatibility checks in a Java 21 environment.

xiaoxinshu-backend/xiaoxinshu/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
xiaoxinshu-backend/xiaoxinshu/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for the wrong JDK version if the source/target compatibility is not updated to match the runtime environment.
